headline: PepsiCo CEO warns on gas prices, consumer spending
summary: PepsiCo spent February cutting prices. Lay's, Doritos, Cheetos, and Tostitos are all down 15%. The company needed American shoppers to start buying snacks again, and cheaper prices seemed like the obvious way to get them back. It didn't really work. And when CEO Ramon Laguarta got on the Q2 ...
